title: verbascum microsepalum
intro: Verbascum microsepalum, also known as the small-sepaled mullein, is a biennial plant species in the figwort family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Verbascum microsepalum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, making it a versatile herbal remedy that can be used to address a range of health concerns.
